Critical Toast
Dashboard Theme
format:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Oswald:wght@400;600;700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg: #0f141a;
  --bg-2: #1a232d;
  --panel: #121a22;
  --panel-2: #16212b;
  --ink: #e7edf4;
  --muted: #a2b3c7;
  --line: #243140;
  --accent: #ffb020;
  --accent-2: #2aa3ff;
  --good: #22c55e;
  --critical: #f97316;
  --danger: #ef4444;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme md-content {
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,176,32,0.12), rgba(42,163,255,0.06)),
    repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(36,49,64,0.35) 0, rgba(36,49,64,0.35) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px),
    repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(36,49,64,0.35) 0, rgba(36,49,64,0.35) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 20% 15%, rgba(42,163,255,0.18), transparent 40%),
    linear-gradient(160deg, var(--bg), var(--bg-2));
  font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
  color: var(--ink);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0b1117, #17212b);
  color: #f8fafc;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,176,32,0.35);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(22,33,43,0.95), rgba(18,26,34,0.95));
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel:before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 0 auto 0;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-2));
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardtitle {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  color: #f8fafc;
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-text p,
.nr-dashboard-theme .value {
  color: #f8fafc;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-text .label {
  color: #d1d5db;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 3px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  margin-right: 8px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-pill.normal {
  background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15);
  color: var(--good);
  border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.5);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-pill.critical {
  background: rgba(239,68,68,0.18);
  color: var(--danger);
  border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.55);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .status-message {
  color: #f8fafc;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme md-slider .md-thumb,
.nr-dashboard-theme md-slider .md-track.md-track-fill {
  background-color: var(--accent);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme md-slider .md-track {
  background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-chart text {
  fill: #d0dbe6;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-chart .chart-container {
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-toast {
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: rgba(239,68,68,0.92);
  color: #0b1117;
}

.console-banner {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,176,32,0.35);
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(15,20,26,0.95), rgba(26,35,45,0.95));
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.banner-title {
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.24em;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.banner-meta {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  color: var(--muted);
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  font-size: 10px;
}

.alert-panel {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,176,32,0.25);
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(16,22,28,0.95), rgba(20,28,36,0.95));
}

.alert-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
}

.alert-indicator {
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--good);
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(34,197,94,0.7);
}

.alert-indicator.critical {
  background: var(--danger);
  box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(239,68,68,0.85);
  animation: pulse-alert 1.2s ease infinite;
}

.alert-title {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 11px;
}

.alert-device {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 11px;
}

.alert-body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.alert-status {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
}

.alert-status.critical {
  color: var(--danger);
}

.alert-status.normal {
  color: var(--good);
}

.alert-message {
  color: #dbe7f3;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.device-table {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(42,163,255,0.25);
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(16,22,28,0.95), rgba(20,28,36,0.95));
}

.device-table-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  color: var(--muted);
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  font-size: 11px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.device-table-body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.device-table-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 6px 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(36,49,64,0.6);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: rgba(18,26,34,0.6);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 11px;
}

.device-id {
  color: var(--accent);
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

.device-seen {
  color: #cfe2f5;
}

.device-table-empty {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 12px;
}

@keyframes panel-in {
  from { transform: translateY(8px); opacity: 0; }
  to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes pulse-alert {
  0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.9; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.25); opacity: 0.4; }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.9; }
}

.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
  animation: panel-in 420ms ease both;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar {
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
    animation: none;
  }

  .alert-indicator.critical {
    animation: none;
  }
}
</style>
